//: SYNC.initFirebase) can READ all live data — this is what makes the
team see each other on the map in real time. Unauthenticated clients
are blocked entirely, so random internet scanners no longer pull the
operational roster, GPS traces, SOS records, or emergency messages.
Write rules preserve the 'everyone broadcasts, everyone sees' model.
Ownership enforcement (a teammate can't overwrite another teammate's
tac_locs / tac_sos entry) will require migrating the app's locally-
generated _myUid to firebase.auth().currentUser.uid — that's a code
change, tracked as a future step. The current auth-gate alone closes
the high-severity 'anyone on the internet' class of attacks.
